meta.title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Tanveer Mittal, Utkarsh Lamba: Building with the Claude Agent SDK
meta.description:
This session, led by Tanveer Mittal and Utkarsh Lamba, members of Technical Staff at Anthropic, explored best practices for building AI agents that elicit the full breadth of intelligence available from Claude models. 

They covered the core model capabilities that enable long-horizon agentic task completion, the latest Claude developer platform features, and the new Claude Agent SDK that makes it even easier for developers to build powerful agents that leverage the same infrastructure as the Anthropic's own products. 

Attendees left with practical guidance for designing agents that can scale to the complexities of real-world use cases.

--------------

Join us at AI Dev 26 x San Francisco! Tickets: https://ai-dev.deeplearning.ai/
